# Java 21 Upgrade Plan

## Overview
Upgrade the Java application to Java 21, the latest LTS version.

## Objectives
- Migrate to Java 21 for improved performance, security, and modern language features
- Update all dependencies to ensure compatibility with Java 21
- Address any API changes or deprecations introduced in Java 21

## Tasks
See `tasks.json` for the detailed task breakdown and execution plan.

## Success Criteria
- Application builds successfully with Java 21
- All existing unit tests pass
- No regressions in functionality
